subject: Re: From Viera
body:
sned me cody's phone number

----- Original Message ----
From: nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com>

Subject: From Viera


"Hello, nice to hear from u! The rest of sunday was good, relaxing... How r u doing today? Its cld be nice to have tea together ,but we still have something to do, so ill give u call as soon as we can!"
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld
